title: 'ethmowl #0865
definition:
1) yesterday, recently, formerly
    1a) yesterday
    1b) formerly (fig.)
    1c) from yesterday, already (in phrase)
 2) (TWOT +) before, before that time, before the time, heretofore,
    of late, of old, these days, time(s) past
